The '''V38 assault fighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] that served as the basis for the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE/ph phantom]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:TIEphantom.jpg|thumb|left|175px|The modified V38 assault fighter, known as the TIE Phantom.]]

Design-wise, it was unique among [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] starfighters, as the [[Quadanium steel/Legends|quadanium steel]] [[Solar collector/Legends|solar panel]] wings attached directly to the hull instead of via pylons. The hull/cockpit itself was non-spherical, compared to other TIEs, though it was similar to the [[Scimitar assault bomber]].

The V38 appeared to have the wing of the [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]], and its triple wing design was reminiscent of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] and the [[Dagger-class starfighter|''Dagger''-class starfighter]].

==History==
The V38 was developed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] on the planet [[Imdaar/Legends|Imdaar]].<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{C|under [[Imdaar Alpha]] entry}}</ref> This type of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was familiar to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], who was able to identify it after viewing footage of TIE Phantoms in action.

{{Ship-stub}}
